name: siggraph-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for the ACM SIGGRAPH Technical Papers program, whose accepted research is published as a special issue of ACM Transactions on Graphics (TOG): the journal-integrated dual-track (Journal vs Conference) model, the Linklings single-round review with a 1000-word text-only rebuttal and a Technical Papers Committee meeting, conditional acceptance plus second-stage verification, the acmart/acmtog format and 7-page conference budget, the paramount supplemental-video and results-reproducibility culture, and the Graphics Replicability Stamp. Grounded in the SIGGRAPH 2026 (Los Angeles) and SIGGRAPH Asia 2026 (Kuala Lumpur) technical-papers calls, ACM DL TOG Vol. 45, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
